src: Over 450 terminal color schemes/themes for iTerm/iTerm2. Includes ports to Terminal, Konsole, PuTTY, Xresources, XRDB, Remmina, Termite, XFCE, Tilda, FreeBSD VT, Terminator, Kitty, MobaXterm, LXTerminal, Microsoft's Windows Terminal, Visual Studio, Alacritty, Ghostty, and many more
ja: iTerm/iTerm2 向け 450 以上のターミナルカラースキーム／テーマ集。Terminal、Konsole、PuTTY、Xresources、XRDB、Remmina、Termite、XFCE、Tilda、FreeBSD VT、Terminator、Kitty、MobaXterm、LXTerminal、Microsoft Windows Terminal、Visual Studio、Alacritty、Ghostty など多数への移植を含む
